name: Changelog.com
description: Changelog.com — developer media network hosting The Changelog podcast and community around open-source software, news, and developer culture.

seo.title: Changelog.com — Developer Documentation / DevRel
seo.meta_description: Changelog.com: Changelog.com — developer media network hosting The Changelog podcast and community around open-source software, news, and developer culture.

when_to_use: Developer podcast launch promoted to OSS community audience
Interview episode featuring open-source project maintainers
Weekly news digest sponsorship for dev-tool brand awareness
Developer advocacy content reaching 100k+ podcast listeners
Community discussion threads extending episode conversations

pros: Long-running, credible podcast network in dev culture
Interviews reach maintainers, founders, and engineers directly
Free, ad-supported content with paid membership perks
cons: Not a tool - it's a media brand, not a product
Podcast format doesn't suit reference learning
Quality varies across their multiple shows
Sponsorship content can blur editorial lines
review.verdict: Essential dev-culture listening, not a learning platform; useful for context, not structured skill-building.
review.best_for: Developers who want to stay current on OSS, infrastructure, and developer culture via podcasts.
review.not_for: Learners seeking structured courses, hands-on exercises, or reference documentation.

developer_experience.reason: OSS code for the site itself
